rankings.reason: Excellent focus on personalized, high-tech traveler comfort and seamless logistics, perfectly aligning with the futuristic 2050 vision.
Highly creative concept using immersive technology to enhance the pre-travel experience, though lacks broader airport operational details.
Provides a comprehensive overview of futuristic airport operations, but the tone is overly promotional rather than experiential.
Fails to meet the futuristic criteria, focusing instead on outdated security procedures and a negative, non-innovative atmosphere.
